_note: Maps a project key (WILLOW_HANDOFF_PROJECT, else workspace dir name) to a default persona. Persona is a voice overlay only — it does not change fleet identity, MCP app_id, Grove sender, or SOIL namespace. A string value is a default (an explicit in-project pick overrides it); an object {"persona": key, "locked": true} is a hard lock — picks in that project are refused. Read by willow.fylgja.persona.project_persona_binding() / project_persona_locked().
